BASE="https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com"
for ep in \
  "1_Featured_Properties:GET:/api/ivx/properties/featured" \
  "2_Property_Details:GET:/api/ivx/properties/test-id" \
  "3_Member_Registration:POST:/api/ivx/auth/register" \
  "4_Email_Verification:POST:/api/ivx/auth/verify-email" \
  "5_SMS_Verification:POST:/api/ivx/auth/verify-sms" \
  "6_Members_Dashboard:GET:/api/ivx/members/dashboard" \
  "7_Investor_Dashboard:GET:/api/ivx/investors/dashboard" \
  "8_CRM:GET:/api/ivx/crm" \
  "9_JV_Deals:GET:/api/ivx/jv-deals" \
  "10_Property_Admin:GET:/api/ivx/admin/properties" \
  "11_Media_Upload:POST:/api/ivx/media/upload" \
  "12_Instagram_Cards:GET:/api/ivx/social/instagram-cards" \
  "13_Likes:GET:/api/ivx/engagement/likes" \
  "14_Comments:GET:/api/ivx/engagement/comments" \
  "15_Shares:GET:/api/ivx/engagement/shares" \
  "16_Saves:GET:/api/ivx/engagement/saves" \
  "17_Analytics:GET:/api/ivx/analytics"
do
  IFS=':' read -r name method path <<< "$ep"
  if [ "$method" = "POST" ]; then
    code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/ivx_resp -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE$path" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{}')
  else
    code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/ivx_resp -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE$path")
  fi
  body=$(cat /tmp/ivx_resp | head -c 200)
  echo "$name: HTTP $code | $body"
  echo "---"
done

    15|--   * service_role bypasses RLS (used by IVX backend proxy).
